Drakescale Belt  
 


Slot: WAIST
AC: 5
DEX: +3
SV FIRE: +10
Focus: Extended Enhancement II
WT: 1.0 Size: SMALL
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Drakescale Belt

Slot: WAIST
AC: 5
DEX: +3
SV FIRE: +10
Focus: Extended Enhancement II
WT: 1.0 Size: SMALL
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)

Item Type:Armor
Stackable:No
Merchant Value:3 pp 8 gp 0 sp 0 cp
Tribute:95
Submitted By:Doriath
Lucy Entry By:Kerasota
Item Updated By:Gidono
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-12-11 07:08:00
Page Updated:Wed Apr 12th, 2017

Expansion: Original
Average Price: No Data Pricing Data...
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 30
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Solusek's Eye (Solusek A)
NPC Name
Singe


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Solusek's Eye (Solusek A)


Uploaded November 27th, 2008
Send a correction
Post Comment
NIce Loot
QuoteReply
# Sep 07 2002 at 1:27 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591758409305
View User Forum
28 posts
Singe dropped it twice last night in a row ,and myself and my Clerec partner are both wearing it. I was wearing BA girdle...yes it has less AC, and normaly I would not consider trading for that reason...but the added time on buffs is too good to pass up cuz; more time = More Mana.
We hunted another 2 hrs after putting these on while camping the efreeti, and the Captain...we did indeed notice a difference. Nice loot)

Edited, Sat Sep 7 14:18:06 2002
▲ Page top
Effect: Extended Enhancement II
QuoteReply
# Jun 06 2002 at 2:13 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592758849502
5 posts
I just noticed that my Drakescale Belt has the effect of Extended Enhancment II. I didn't notice this before so I decided to come here and look it up. Alas there is no info listed on this effect. Is this a change to this item or is it somthing that I have over looked? If it's new how does that change the value?
▲ Page top
RE: Effect: Extended Enhancement II
QuoteReply
# Jun 12 2002 at 1:17 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593966048168
8 posts
This is part of the new upgrade to alot of the older items the effect gives an extra 15% Duration to all Buffs spells lev 44 and lower cast by caster.
for example Haste/Clarity/Magic Resistance.

Its a very nice effect and definatly worth keeping.

Edited, Wed Jun 12 02:10:45 2002
▲ Page top
Found on Vendor
QuoteReply
# Jan 15 2002 at 12:15 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592757763378
Sage
75 posts
Just got this off a vendor in FP. Cost of 10pp, added it to my Fire Resist gear. It amazes me how the pricing of player sold items is so screwy at vendors. I can sell a Giant Tree Flayer to a vendor and get 40pp, and then they try to sell for 1k. Worthless weapon no one would ever want. Then, a good item like this belt you get a couple plat for it and they sell for 10pp.

/boggles

Fallloraan Trueblade
49th Season Paladin
Tholuxe Paells
▲ Page top
Traded
QuoteReply
# Nov 24 2001 at 3:20 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592251774853
11 posts
I traded a Wu's fighting shirt off of my monk for this...my sk only had a thick leather apron and i wasnt using my monk very much so it was an awsome trade for me )
▲ Page top
No way
QuoteReply
# Nov 13 2001 at 2:30 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591763660706
61 posts
This price is insane. 5ac and 3dex isn't anything fantastic, but the 10fr isn't bad. I'd probably pay 200-300 for this. Otherwise I'd just go camp it myself.

BTW, go look at the pricing. Somebody named Spine posted 2k, and he's the only one. Also look down. He's tried to alter prices on alotta things, like the CGS. Looks like others are selling for 200-400, so 300 sounds about right.
▲ Page top
price check
QuoteReply
# Nov 11 2001 at 4:18 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591769484048
5 posts
can someone confirm this pricing, seems a bit much for an item with such little stats. Also ppl look at me funny even when i sell for 1500pp

thx much for any info
▲ Page top
RE: price check
QuoteReply
# Aug 14 2004 at 6:29 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592259242715
View User Forum
133 posts
Price Boosters...

We get these peeps less and less on Tarew Marr. Fact is very few people will rely on one person's word for a PC anymore. Sad, it is that some will try to gouge, but that is what it is all about in the real world too. It only makes sense that the EQ world would see corruption and greed after a period of time.
I hope that everyone uses this as an example and gets more than one PC and learns to compare prices when they shop.
▲ Page top
RE: price check
QuoteReply
# Dec 08 2001 at 7:28 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591760347363
46 posts
Looks like someone is trying to raise the price up, they're only about 100-200pp
▲ Page top
RE: price check
QuoteReply
# Nov 30 2001 at 11:20 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593361322235
55 posts
I think that if you check the price of most items in here, they will be quite higher than people sell things for in the actual game. Best thing to do is use this as a guide to what to sell things for. Personally I wouldn't pay more than 50-100 plat, and that's if I REALLY wanted this belt.
